message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-resilience): pin ResilienceLayer retry/circuit-breaker/bulkhead/load-shed routing-decision contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-pmjio)

39 tests pinning the host-side retry-and-resilience contract every
connector invocation flows through. Zero prior conformance coverage
despite NORMATIVE defaults (drift = silent change to host's tolerance
of upstream flakiness or load-shed aggression).

- CircuitBreakerConfig defaults: failure_threshold=3,
  success_threshold=2, open_duration=5s, window=30s,
  failure_predicate=AnyError
- BulkheadConfig defaults: max_concurrent=16, max_queued=32,
  queue_timeout=250ms
- HealthRouterConfig defaults: unhealthy=3, recovery=2,
  latency_degraded=750ms, error_rate=500‰, probe=5s, window=30s,
  ewma_alpha=200‰
- LoadShedConfig defaults: shed=850‰ (start), full=1000‰,
  sheddable=[Low, Normal] (Critical and High NEVER shed by default)
- ResilienceConfig::default operation_timeout=None
- RoutingDecision four variants (Allow/AllowDegraded/AllowProbe/Reject)
  with reason payload + equality + clone
- CircuitState three variants (Closed/Open/HalfOpen); fresh layer
  starts Closed
- RequestPriority four variants with Hash for HashMap use
- FailurePredicate four variants distinct (AnyError/TimeoutsOnly/
  SlowResponses/ErrorOrSlowResponses)
- ResilienceError Display contract for all 8 variants — incident
  log greps depend on these literal substrings
- ResilienceMetricsSnapshot default all-zero; fresh-connector metrics
  match Default::default

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
